message:
test(drawing): add 28 edge-case tests for Draw trait, BorderChars, line/rect/paint ops (bd-1sbn6)

Cover BorderChars trait impls and constant verification (DOUBLE/HEAVY/ASCII),
draw_rect_outline 1xN/Nx1/3x3/empty, draw_border 1x3/3x1/2x1/1x2 edge
shapes, draw_box 3x3 minimal interior/1x1/border-overwrites-fill, paint_area
both-colors/beyond-buffer/no-colors, print_text_clipped max_x=0/past-start,
line overflow past buffer, scissor clipping on rect_filled/vertical_line,
and comprehensive 1x1 buffer stress test across all drawing primitives.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
